title: Real-time Tool Visualization with Elapsed Time

findings.description: ToolCallBlock component renders tool calls with status indicators (running spinner, complete checkmark, error X), tool icons, expandable input/output, and elapsed time display
findings.evidence: ToolCallBlock.tsx lines 121-125: renders elapsedSeconds during 'running' status. Lines 60-84: StatusIndicator with spinner/check/error icons

findings.description: StatusBar includes ActiveToolDisplay and TurnTimer for real-time streaming feedback
findings.evidence: StatusBar.tsx lines 53-54: TurnTimer and ActiveToolDisplay components in center section

findings.description: Rich tool-specific renderers exist for Bash, FileRead, FileWrite, FileEdit, Grep, Glob, WebFetch, WebSearch, NotebookEdit, and BrowserAutomation tools via gen-ui registry
findings.evidence: gen-ui/registry.ts and dedicated display components (BashToolRenderer.tsx, FileReadDisplay.tsx, etc.)

findings.description: Cannot verify live tool visualization during streaming because opening existing conversations crashes the app (known issue). Would need to send a new message to trigger tool use.
findings.evidence: Known issue documented in walk instructions
